clear-case.result: 100% in all three conditions; ceiling hit

near-boundary.pair_selection: top 10 by Jaccard similarity (≥0.13) from 27 overlap signals

condition_definitions.true-baseline: User prompt only; free-form capability label mapped to the package taxonomy after the response

limitations: Near-boundary suite has one batched run per condition, so it has no variance estimate.
Findings are specific to the evaluated prompts and require replication before broader generalization.
artifact_notes: Each condition run evaluated its suite as a batch; observations within a run are not statistically independent.
Raw near-boundary responses are included. Clear-case results are included as parsed scored observations; raw clear-case response text was not preserved in this artifact.
verification_scope: The artifact deterministically verifies scoring from recorded outputs and frozen ground truth; it does not rerun the original model invocations.
